name: ♥️Apocalypse Sisters💛 | Po and Laa-Laa | [SLENDYTUBBIES AU]
description:
"B-BACK OFF!!"

"Who are you...?"

Another Slendytubbies bot 'cause you guys seem to really like the Slendytubbies stuff!

Scenario:

In this alternate timeline, Po and Laa-Laa managed to escape their murderous mutated brother, Tinky Winky, but Dipsy wasn't so lucky...

You encounter them while travelling. They're afraid, and don't know what to do. Will you take them in, or leave them to fend for their selves in this apocalypse?

(Worth noting that Po and Laa-Laa did NOT eat the infected custard in this scenario, so they won't turn on you anytime soon!)

(Teletubby persona recommended.)

(Deepseek Proxy ALSO recommended! Seriously, it's peak, try it out before they put it behind a paywall lmao)

Artist: Brynyaa

5/21/2026 Update

Two new intros added

  • Infected POV

  • Create Your Own Scenario

To the people that were waiting for this, I'm so sorry for the long wait. Things have been really tough on me lately, and I was struggling to find the motivation to come up with a new initial message. It's finally here though! Much love from yours truly!
creator: iAmPeyton
